data.content: Implemented persistent terminal light theme support across the live terminal header, history debugger header, and Settings. Added shared React Query-backed preference syncing to /api/settings, persisted terminalLightTheme in the server-side settings store, themed xterm instances plus surrounding terminal chrome for light/dark modes, and added tests/contracts for settings persistence and the shared Light Theme controls. Validation completed with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build, plus browser verification on http://localhost:3001: toggled Light Theme from the terminal header and Settings, confirmed both controls stayed in sync, opened the History Debugger and confirmed its header reflected the same state, reloaded, and verified terminalLightTheme=false persisted in ~/.config/foolery/settings.toml and /api/settings.
